repos.excerpt: A basic collection of terminal commands to back up folders as zip files on your Windows PC.
A simple Google-Chrome extension that scans for buttons when watching Netflix and automatically presses them.

Demiplane is an interactive collaborative whiteboard tool designed to be used as a lightweight virtual tabletop environment. Users can move tokens around, set a grid, and apply a background. Currently still in heavy development.
A Discord bot designed for movie nights which tracks movies and integrates AI to offer remarks about movies or participate in conversations, all while impersonating Adam Sandler.
Videogame project in C# using MonoGame, featuring robots collecting ores in a procedurally generated world.
A Discord bot for Dungeons & Dragons with dice rolling, data lookup, homebrew support, character generation, sound effects, and more.
